config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the rights of the individual, because that can easily be used to justify abuse of power. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first and then balances them with the common good through fair laws. From my perspective, social order matters, but it should never erase basic human dignity and freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diutamakan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas nama “kebaikan bersama,” hak minoritas dan kebebasan sipil sering jadi korban. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, proses hukum yang adil, dan perlindungan dari penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang menekan individu demi ketertiban, melainkan yang menjaga hak individu sambil mencari kepentingan bersama secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I disagree with the statement, because in my view society is strongest when it protects individual rights rather than treating them as secondary. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how “public interest” can be used to silence people, protect officials, or pressure minorities, so I do not trust any claim that society should automatically come first. That does not mean individual freedom is absolute; public safety, order, and shared responsibilities do matter, but they must be limited by clear rules and human dignity. A good society is not one that crushes the person for the group, but one that balances both without giving unchecked power to the majority or the state.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “kepentingan masyarakat” dipakai sebagai alasan untuk membatasi kebebasan sipil dan menekan kelompok minoritas. Poin tentang ketertiban dan tanggung jawab bersama memang valid, tetapi bagi saya itu tidak pernah boleh menjadi alasan untuk menyingkirkan hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, due process, dan perlindungan dari penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Kalau hak individu dianggap sekunder, yang biasanya paling cepat dirugikan bukan orang yang kuat, melainkan mereka yang paling rentan. Masyarakat yang benar-benar sehat justru membangun kepentingan bersama dengan menghormati hak individu, bukan mengorbankannya.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I still reject the idea that society should automatically come before the rights of the individual, because in Indonesia that kind of language is often used to pressure ordinary people and excuse unfair treatment. Public order and shared responsibility matter, but if the state or the majority can override rights whenever it claims the “common good,” then minorities and critics become the first victims. From my perspective, a society is only legitimate when it protects individual dignity first and uses collective interests as a limit, not as a blank check. The common good should be built through rights, not above them.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika “kepentingan umum” diberi prioritas mutlak, hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, sensor, dan penindasan terhadap minoritas. Poin tentang ketertiban dan tanggung jawab bersama memang penting, tetapi itu hanya sah kalau dibatasi oleh hak dasar seperti kebebasan berbicara, due process, dan perlindungan yang setara. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan individu demi kelompok, melainkan yang membangun kebaikan bersama dengan menghormati martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
